name: Butterfinger Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth and add the butterfingers.
2. Gently fold in the thawed Cool Whip until combined.
3. Transfer the mixture to the prepared pie shell.
4. Allow the filling to firm in the refrigerator. It is best to prepare it the day before serving.
5. If unable to serve immediately, place the pie in the freezer to firm up.
